overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit Asian-inspired covered market at night, ascending stairs to an elevated plaza with holographic cherry blossom trees, and approaching a massive cylindrical industrial tower. The scene features vibrant neon signage, red paper lanterns, and cyberpunk aesthetics with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market arcade with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market street, passing various food stalls and neon signage

notable_agents.action: chef working behind counter at noodle stall

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the market street with hanging red lanterns
strings of illuminated red traditional paper lanterns hanging overhead
food vendor counter with steam rising and neon menu displays
futuristic vending machine with glowing blue interface

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk market street at night, illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. Various food stalls line the right side while vending machines and digital screens occupy the left. The roof structure creates a sheltered corridor with wet reflective concrete flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase transition from market to upper plaza

events.description: turns left and begins ascending concrete stairs, exiting the covered market area
emerging from covered stairwell into open upper plaza with massive structure visible

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to upper level, revealing massive cylindrical tower structure above

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket ascending stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
enormous industrial cylindrical structure dominating the skyline with green metallic surface
ornate curved roof with red trim visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a concrete staircase that transitions from the enclosed market to an open upper plaza. The lighting shifts from neon-dominated to a mix of ambient city glow and neon as the massive cylindrical industrial tower becomes visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with holographic trees and color-changing floor panels

events.description: glowing floor panels shift color from yellow to bright red
glowing floor panels shift color from red to magenta purple

agents.ego_description: walking along illuminated elevated walkway with glowing floor panels that cycle through colors, passing holographic cherry trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking along the glowing path

entered.detail: illuminated floor tiles that glow yellow and change colors sequentially
artificial tree with glowing pink digital cherry blossoms and falling petal effects
large digital screens displaying advertisements with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated open-air plaza with illuminated floor panels that cycle through yellow, red, and purple colors. Holographic cherry blossom trees with glowing pink petals line the walkway while the massive cylindrical tower looms larger in the center view. Neon billboards and traditional architectural elements mix in the cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza at base of massive industrial tower with food kiosks

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the full height of the massive cylindrical tower
passing close to holographic cherry tree with petals falling

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive tower, looking upward at its scale, passing food kiosks and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying glowing red umbrella walking past food kiosk

entered.detail: small food vendor booth with bright red neon trim and menu displays
elevated circular platform with glowing base near the tower

segments.scene_description: Approaching the base of the massive cylindrical industrial tower, which now dominates the center of the frame. The camera tilts upward to reveal its full height against the night sky. Passing a bright red food kiosk and pedestrians with umbrellas near the tower base, with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit market street into an expansive open-air plaza dominated by a massive industrial tower. It begins by gliding through a covered corridor lined with food stalls and digital screens, where red paper lanterns reflect off wet concrete flooring. As the camera ascends a concrete staircase, the enclosed market gives way to an upper plaza, shifting the lighting from dense neon to a broader ambient city glow as the cylindrical tower first appears on the horizon. The scene then expands across an elevated walkway featuring color-cycling floor panels and holographic cherry blossom trees, with the tower looming ever larger against the night sky. Finally, the camera approaches the base of the structure, passing a bright red food kiosk and pedestrians with umbrellas before tilting upward to reveal the full height of the industrial tower.
